raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites assessment of how the section frames the protocol, contribution, and motivating claim.","R1.2":"A general reaction to the passage centrally includes whether the protocol description and resulting conclusions follow coherently.","R1.3":"The artifact reports accuracy and correlation claims, so judging whether the stated evidence supports those claims is an expected responsibility.","R1.5":"Because the artifact is a draft section, feedback would naturally cover whether the ordering and narrative progression work at the section level.","R1.6":"The passage has repeated phrasing and sentence-level style issues, making writing polish a central expected responsibility for a general opinion request.","RX.1":"Any projection of an open-ended evaluation must preserve uncertainty about the intended depth and criteria of assessment.","RX.2":"The broad prompt requires guarding against assigning responsibilities beyond what the delegation actually asks.","RX.3":"The response must stay within projecting responsibilities rather than performing the requested assessment.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading or harmful downstream treatment of the artifact as already evaluated.","RX.5":"The selected responsibilities should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the visible features of the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites assessment of how the section frames the protocol, contribution, and motivating claim.
rationale.R1.2: A general reaction to the passage centrally includes whether the protocol description and resulting conclusions follow coherently.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact reports accuracy and correlation claims, so judging whether the stated evidence supports those claims is an expected responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: Because the artifact is a draft section, feedback would naturally cover whether the ordering and narrative progression work at the section level.
rationale.R1.6: The passage has repeated phrasing and sentence-level style issues, making writing polish a central expected responsibility for a general opinion request.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of an open-ended evaluation must preserve uncertainty about the intended depth and criteria of assessment.
rationale.RX.2: The broad prompt requires guarding against assigning responsibilities beyond what the delegation actually asks.
rationale.RX.3: The response must stay within projecting responsibilities rather than performing the requested assessment.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading or harmful downstream treatment of the artifact as already evaluated.
rationale.RX.5: The selected responsibilities should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the visible features of the artifact.
